clauses.title: Understanding the organization and its context
clauses.description: The organization shall determine external and internal issues relevant to its purpose that affect its ability to achieve the intended outcomes of its ABMS.

clauses.title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
clauses.description: The organization shall determine interested parties relevant to the ABMS and their relevant requirements.

clauses.title: Determining the scope of the ABMS
clauses.description: The organization shall determine the boundaries and applicability of the ABMS to establish its scope.

clauses.title: Anti-bribery management system
clauses.description: The organization shall establish, implement, maintain and continually improve the ABMS.

clauses.title: Bribery risk assessment
clauses.description: The organization shall undertake regular and comprehensive assessment of bribery risk.

clauses.title: Leadership and commitment
clauses.description: Top management shall demonstrate leadership and commitment with respect to the ABMS.

clauses.title: Anti-bribery policy
clauses.description: Top management shall establish, implement and maintain an anti-bribery policy.

clauses.title: Roles, responsibilities and authorities
clauses.description: Top management shall ensure responsibilities and authorities for relevant roles are assigned and communicated.

clauses.title: Anti-bribery compliance function
clauses.description: Top management shall ensure the establishment of an anti-bribery compliance function.

clauses.title: Delegated decision-making
clauses.description: The organization shall implement controls over delegated decision-making authority.

clauses.title: Actions to address risks and opportunities
clauses.description: The organization shall consider the bribery risks and opportunities for the ABMS.

clauses.title: Anti-bribery objectives and planning
clauses.description: The organization shall establish anti-bribery objectives at relevant functions and levels.

clauses.title: Resources
clauses.description: The organization shall determine and provide the resources needed for the ABMS.

clauses.title: Competence
clauses.description: The organization shall ensure persons doing work that affects bribery risk are competent.

clauses.title: Awareness and training
clauses.description: Persons working under the organization's control shall be aware of the anti-bribery policy.

clauses.title: Communication
clauses.description: The organization shall determine relevant internal and external communications related to the ABMS.

clauses.title: Documented information
clauses.description: The organization's ABMS shall include documented information required by ISO 37001.

clauses.title: Operational planning and control
clauses.description: The organization shall plan, implement, control and review processes to address bribery risks.

clauses.title: Due diligence
clauses.description: The organization shall undertake due diligence on relevant transactions, projects, activities, business associates and personnel.

clauses.title: Financial controls
clauses.description: The organization shall implement financial controls to manage bribery risk.

clauses.title: Non-financial controls
clauses.description: The organization shall implement non-financial controls to manage bribery risk.

clauses.title: Anti-bribery commitments by controlled organizations
clauses.description: The organization shall implement procedures for managing anti-bribery commitments.

clauses.title: Gifts, hospitality, donations and similar benefits
clauses.description: The organization shall have controls over gifts, hospitality, donations and similar benefits.

clauses.title: Managing inadequate anti-bribery controls
clauses.description: The organization shall have procedures to manage situations with inadequate controls.

clauses.title: Conflict of interest register
clauses.description: The organization shall maintain a conflict of interest register and management procedures.

clauses.title: Raising concerns
clauses.description: The organization shall have procedures for persons to raise bribery concerns.

clauses.title: Investigating and dealing with bribery
clauses.description: The organization shall have procedures for investigating and dealing with bribery.

clauses.title: Monitoring, measurement, analysis and evaluation
clauses.description: The organization shall evaluate the performance and effectiveness of the ABMS.

clauses.title: Internal audit
clauses.description: The organization shall conduct internal audits of the ABMS at planned intervals.

clauses.title: Management review
clauses.description: Top management shall review the ABMS at planned intervals.

clauses.title: Governing body review
clauses.description: The governing body shall review the ABMS and evaluate its effectiveness.

clauses.title: Nonconformity and corrective action
clauses.description: When a nonconformity occurs, the organization shall react to the nonconformity.

clauses.title: Continual improvement
clauses.description: The organization shall continually improve the suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of the ABMS.

clauses.title: Understanding the organization and its context
clauses.description: Determine external and internal issues relevant to the organization's compliance obligations.

clauses.title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
clauses.description: Determine interested parties and their relevant compliance requirements.

clauses.title: Determining the scope of the CMS
clauses.description: Determine the boundaries and applicability of the compliance management system.

clauses.title: Compliance management system
clauses.description: Establish, implement, maintain and continually improve the CMS.

clauses.title: Compliance obligations
clauses.description: Identify, analyze and record the organization's compliance obligations.

clauses.title: Compliance risk assessment
clauses.description: Identify, analyze and evaluate the organization's compliance risks.

clauses.title: Governing body
clauses.description: Governing body shall exercise oversight of the compliance management system.

clauses.title: Top management commitment
clauses.description: Top management shall demonstrate leadership and commitment.

clauses.title: Compliance policy
clauses.description: Establish and maintain an appropriate compliance policy.

clauses.title: Roles, responsibilities and authorities
clauses.description: Assign and communicate relevant roles and responsibilities.

clauses.title: Compliance function
clauses.description: Establish an effective compliance function.

clauses.title: Actions to address compliance risks
clauses.description: The organization shall identify, analyze and evaluate compliance risks.

clauses.title: Compliance objectives
clauses.description: Establish compliance objectives at relevant functions, levels and processes.

clauses.title: Resources
clauses.description: Determine and provide the resources needed for the CMS.

clauses.title: Competence
clauses.description: Ensure competence of persons affecting compliance performance.

clauses.title: Awareness
clauses.description: Persons under the organization's control shall be aware of the compliance policy.

clauses.title: Communication
clauses.description: Determine and implement internal and external communications for compliance.

clauses.title: Documented information
clauses.description: Include required documented information in the CMS.

clauses.title: Operational planning and control
clauses.description: Plan, implement, control and review operational processes.

clauses.title: Establishing controls and procedures
clauses.description: Establish and maintain appropriate compliance controls.

clauses.title: Compliance training and education
clauses.description: The organization shall establish a compliance training and education program.

clauses.title: Raising concerns
clauses.description: Implement procedures for raising compliance concerns.

clauses.title: Investigation process
clauses.description: Have procedures for investigating compliance concerns.

clauses.title: Monitoring, measurement, analysis and evaluation
clauses.description: Monitor and evaluate compliance performance.

clauses.title: Internal audit
clauses.description: Conduct internal audits at planned intervals.

clauses.title: Management review
clauses.description: Top management shall review the CMS.

clauses.title: Nonconformity and corrective action
clauses.description: React to nonconformities and take corrective action.

clauses.title: Continual improvement
clauses.description: Continually improve the suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of the CMS.

clauses.title: Understanding the organization and its context
clauses.description: Determine external and internal issues relevant to information security.

clauses.title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
clauses.description: Determine interested parties and their ISMS requirements.

clauses.title: Determining the scope of the ISMS
clauses.description: Determine boundaries and applicability of the ISMS.

clauses.title: Information security management system
clauses.description: Establish, implement, maintain and continually improve an ISMS.

clauses.title: Leadership and commitment
clauses.description: Top management shall demonstrate leadership and commitment to the ISMS.

clauses.title: Information security policy
clauses.description: Top management shall establish an information security policy.

clauses.title: Organizational roles, responsibilities and authorities
clauses.description: Assign and communicate ISMS roles and responsibilities.

clauses.title: General risk actions
clauses.description: Consider risks and opportunities when planning for the ISMS.

clauses.title: Information security risk assessment
clauses.description: The organization shall perform information security risk assessments at planned intervals.

clauses.title: Information security risk treatment
clauses.description: Define and apply an information security risk treatment process.

clauses.title: Information security objectives
clauses.description: Establish IS objectives at relevant functions and levels.

clauses.title: Resources
clauses.description: Determine and provide resources needed for the ISMS.

clauses.title: Competence
clauses.description: Ensure competence of persons affecting IS performance.

clauses.title: Awareness
clauses.description: Persons shall be aware of the IS policy and their contribution.

clauses.title: Communication
clauses.description: Determine internal and external IS communications.

clauses.title: Documented information
clauses.description: Include required documented information for the ISMS.

clauses.title: Operational planning and control
clauses.description: Plan, implement, control and review processes to meet requirements.

clauses.title: Information security risk assessment execution
clauses.description: Perform IS risk assessments at planned intervals.

clauses.title: Information security risk treatment execution
clauses.description: Implement the IS risk treatment plan.

clauses.title: Monitoring, measurement, analysis and evaluation
clauses.description: Evaluate IS performance and ISMS effectiveness.

clauses.title: Internal audit
clauses.description: Conduct ISMS internal audits at planned intervals.

clauses.title: Management review
clauses.description: Top management shall review the ISMS.

clauses.title: Nonconformity and corrective action
clauses.description: React to IS nonconformities and take corrective action.

clauses.title: Continual improvement
clauses.description: Continually improve the ISMS.

clauses.title: Understanding the organization and its context
clauses.description: Determine external and internal issues relevant to the QMS.

clauses.title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
clauses.description: Determine interested parties and their requirements.

clauses.title: Determining the scope of the QMS
clauses.description: Determine boundaries and applicability of the QMS.

clauses.title: Quality management system and its processes
clauses.description: Establish, implement, maintain and improve the QMS.

clauses.title: Leadership and commitment
clauses.description: Top management shall demonstrate leadership and commitment with respect to the QMS.

clauses.title: Quality policy
clauses.description: Establish, implement and maintain a quality policy.

clauses.title: Organizational roles, responsibilities and authorities
clauses.description: Assign and communicate relevant roles and responsibilities.

clauses.title: Actions to address risks and opportunities
clauses.description: Consider risks and opportunities for the QMS.

clauses.title: Quality objectives and planning
clauses.description: Establish quality objectives at relevant functions and levels.

clauses.title: Planning of changes
clauses.description: Ensure changes to the QMS are carried out in a planned manner.

clauses.title: Resources
clauses.description: Determine and provide resources needed for the QMS.

clauses.title: Competence
clauses.description: Ensure competence of persons affecting QMS performance.

clauses.title: Awareness
clauses.description: Persons shall be aware of the quality policy.

clauses.title: Communication
clauses.description: Determine relevant QMS communications.

clauses.title: Documented information
clauses.description: Include required documented information for the QMS.

clauses.title: Operational planning and control
clauses.description: Plan, implement, control and review processes needed to meet requirements.

clauses.title: Requirements for products and services
clauses.description: Determine requirements for products and services offered.

clauses.title: Design and development
clauses.description: Establish processes for design and development of products/services.

clauses.title: Control of externally provided processes
clauses.description: Ensure externally provided processes, products and services conform.

clauses.title: Production and service provision
clauses.description: Implement production and service provision under controlled conditions.

clauses.title: Release of products and services
clauses.description: Implement planned arrangements to verify product/service requirements.

clauses.title: Control of nonconforming outputs
clauses.description: Ensure nonconforming outputs are identified and controlled.

clauses.title: Monitoring, measurement, analysis and evaluation
clauses.description: Determine what needs to be monitored and measured.

clauses.title: Internal audit
clauses.description: Conduct internal audits at planned intervals.

clauses.title: Management review
clauses.description: Top management shall review the QMS.

clauses.title: General improvement
clauses.description: Determine and select opportunities for improvement.

clauses.title: Nonconformity and corrective action
clauses.description: React to nonconformities and take corrective action.

clauses.title: Continual improvement
clauses.description: Continually improve the QMS.
